# Altered memories

E.M. Gemovich's 7th literary venture is a memoir of her life.
By writing this she is giving over her memories to The Taker of Thoughts.

Whilst traversing her mind the investigators will come upon her treasured memories.
There is one key memory to each of her book series (one for romance, one for fantasy, etc.).
The Taker of thoughts is attempting to alter these into horrible memories and make her lose her loved ones in her mind.

The first run the investigators enter a memory they will see it play out as normal.
However subsequent runs The Taker of Thoughts will attempt to ruin the memory.
The investigators can try to stop this.

In these memories all unnamed characters are [self-inserts](/the_taker_of_thoughts/literary_beings.qmd#self-insert).
The investigators can take the place of any of the [self-inserts](/the_taker_of_thoughts/literary_beings.qmd#self-insert) when they enter a memory.
